validation_intent: Define forming, sealing, and filling process intent and packaging system scope.
technical_expression: Define the forming, sealing, and filling process and packaging system boundaries.
plain_language_expression: Describe what the FFS machine does and what packaging system it supports.
trace_notes: Defines scope for all downstream validation.

validation_intent: Verify installation, utilities, and environmental suitability.
technical_expression: Verify utilities, air supply, forming/sealing stations, and safety systems.
plain_language_expression: Confirm the machine is installed correctly and safely.

validation_intent: Ensure forming and sealing sensors are calibrated and traceable.
technical_expression: Ensure temperature, pressure, and timing sensors are calibrated.
plain_language_expression: Make sure sensors used to prove sealing are accurate.

validation_intent: Define and lock control system configuration.
technical_expression: Define cycle recipes, alarms, interlocks, and configuration baselines.
plain_language_expression: Lock down machine settings so they can’t drift.

technical_expression: Challenge forming temperature, dwell, and vacuum parameters.
plain_language_expression: Test forming settings to ensure consistent forming quality.

technical_expression: Challenge sealing temperature, pressure, and dwell time.
plain_language_expression: Test sealing settings to ensure strong, consistent seals.

validation_intent: Establish operating window for forming and sealing.
technical_expression: Define acceptable ranges for forming and sealing parameters.
plain_language_expression: Define the safe operating ranges for the machine.

validation_intent: Demonstrate seal integrity under routine conditions.
technical_expression: Demonstrate seal strength and integrity under routine conditions.
plain_language_expression: Prove seals hold up in real production.

technical_expression: Define routine checks for sealing and forming parameters.
plain_language_expression: Define what operators check every run.
